page: OVHcloud b2-15 is a general-purpose virtual server hosted on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by 4 dedicated physical cores of an Intel Core Processor (Haswell, no TSX) running at 2.0 GHz. The system is equipped with 15.0 GB of RAM, providing 3.75 GB of memory per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 100 GB SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the b2-15 sits primarily in the lower tiers for compute-heavy tasks. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance tests via stress-ng and Geekbench rank in the bottom 10% to 25%. However, memory performance is more balanced, with cached small-block read-only memory bandwidth and Passmark memory scores achieving average ratings in the middle 50%. Database operations and Redis SET operations also perform at an average level, while static web serving throughput and larger LLM inference tasks show weaker results.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio, the b2-15 offers a cost-effective option for workloads that require stable, non-burstable resources but do not demand high-performance modern CPU instructions like AVX-512. It is best suited for general-purpose workloads such as light database operations, basic web serving, Redis caching, and lightweight application hosting.
description: The OVHcloud b2-15 is a general-purpose virtual server utilizing the KVM hypervisor and an x86_64 Intel Core Processor (Haswell) with 4 dedicated physical cores running at 2.0 GHz. It is configured with 15.0 GB of RAM (3.75 GB per core) and a bundled 100 GB local SSD. Benchmark data shows that while its CPU compute performance is relatively weak, ranking in the bottom 10% to 25% for single-core and multi-core tests, its memory subsystem performs at an average level. Passmark memory scores, cached read-only memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations all place in the middle 50% tier. This server is a qualitatively cost-effective option for workloads requiring dedicated resources without high-compute demands. It is best suited for light database operations, basic web serving, caching, and general-purpose application hosting.
og_description: OVHcloud b2-15 is a general-purpose KVM virtual server featuring 4 dedicated Intel Haswell cores, 15 GB RAM, and a 100 GB local SSD, offering balanced memory performance for light database and web workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud b2-15 is a general-purpose KVM server with 4 dedicated Intel cores, 15 GB RAM, and a 100 GB SSD, suitable for light database and web hosting.
tagline: A dedicated four-core virtual server with balanced memory performance and local SSD storage for stable, general-purpose workloads.

15.0 GB of system memory and a bundled 100 GB local SSD
Average performance in memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations
KVM-based virtualization with one complimentary public IPv4 address
Best suited for light database operations, caching, and basic web serving
